title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 23 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 23 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 23 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today，an increase of 7.81% throughout the day. The highest price is 598.5, Most traders do not quote pricesin the morning,but afternoon the quotation increased compared with yesterday 50-70 yuan/ mt. The enthusiasm of steels works has increased.Today's overall market transaction atmosphere is good.
